slides.title: The number that watches your *kidneys*.
slides.sub: eGFR estimates how fast your kidneys filter your blood. It can catch a silent decline early.

slides.title: A filter rate, scored
slides.body: eGFR is the *estimated filtration rate*: how many milliliters of blood your kidneys clean each minute. One simple blood test gives the number.

slides.title: The decline is silent
slides.body: Kidney function can fall for years *without symptoms*. By the time you feel it, a lot of filtering capacity may already be gone.

slides.title: Trouble, before you feel it
slides.body: A falling eGFR *is linked to* early kidney strain. Catching it sooner gives you time to protect the organ that cleans your blood.

slides.title: The kidneys love basics
slides.body: Steady blood pressure, blood sugar and hydration *can support* healthy filtration. The everyday habits matter more than any quick fix.

slides.title: Track the trend, not one test
slides.body: A single eGFR is a snapshot. The *direction over time* is what tells the real story of how your kidneys are holding up.

slides.title: Protect the organ that *cleans your blood*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns the sleep, food, movement and steps behind kidney health into one daily Health Score, so the right habits stay easy to keep.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your kidneys quietly clean your blood every minute, and the decline can stay silent for years. One eGFR number can catch it early. 🌿

It is a filter rate, the trend matters more than one test, and steady blood pressure, blood sugar and hydration can support it. Save this for your next checkup. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The eGFR Test: Your Kidneys' Silent Warning Number
